entry.title: New: RES26-156 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE DEPARTMENT OF THE CORPORATION COUNSEL TO INITIATE LEGAL ACTION AGAINST SHAY TAL AND MIRIAM J.H.S. TAL TO STOP ADVERTISEMENTS OF THEIR UNPERMITTED BED AND BREAKFAST HOME OR TRANSIENT VACATION UNIT.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
